grader.criterion: Every user-supplied endpoint page appears in endpoint-coverage.matrix.yaml and has a corresponding contract file in contracts/endpoints/.
Users, Rooms, Templates, Workspaces, and Search all have explicit function inventory beyond category prose.

The Users family must expose all 10 operations: getcurrentmember, getroommembers, inviteuserstoroom, updateroommemberpermissions, removeroomusers, getmuralusers, inviteuserstomural, updatemuralmemberpermissions, removemuralusers, inviteuserstoworkspace.
updatemuralmemberpermissions must identify userId as a PATH parameter, not a body parameter — it is not symmetric with updateroommemberpermissions.
